items.prompt: A virtual interface inside a class is…
choices: A handle pointing at a concrete interface instance in tb
items.explain: virtual if is a class-side pointer to signals bundled in an interface.

items.prompt: Before a driver task can do vif.tx <= v, you must…
choices: Assign the virtual handle to the tb interface instance
Convert the class to a module
items.explain: drv.vif = bif (or config_db) connects the class to real pins.

items.prompt: You can pass module ports directly into a class constructor the same way you pass integers.
items.explain: Classes use virtual interface handles to reach hierarchical signals.

items.prompt: In the wiring checklist, DUT connection comes…
choices: After interface declare and tb instance, before class drive
Only inside the driver class constructor
After all simulation time has elapsed
items.explain: Declare IF → instance in tb → wire DUT → virtual in class → assign → drive.

items.prompt: Modports on an interface mainly help…
choices: Restrict which directions each component may drive or sample
items.explain: Modports enforce driver vs monitor views of the same bundle.
